top.title: Israeli strikes kill nine in Lebanon as Hezbollah fires rockets over border
top.summary: The incidents strain a partial ceasefire agreed by Israel and the Lebanese armed group on Monday.

top.title: One killed and dozens injured in Iranian drone strikes on Kuwait airport
top.summary: Iran says the attack on Kuwait was in retaliation for earlier US strikes on an Iranian oil tanker and island.

top.title: 'Crazy' phone call between Trump and Netanyahu complicates Iran talks
top.summary: Israel's PM laughed off reports of friction, but he has tested the patience of other US presidents.

top.title: Phone signal on trains not good enough most of the time, research says
top.summary: Ofcom found the major phone networks were not providing good signal on trains, and train companies were slowing down wi-fi.

top.title: Lloyds, Halifax and Bank of Scotland back after online banking outage
top.summary: "We're aware some customers are having issues with our app and online banking. We're really sorry about this," Lloyds Bank posted on X.

top.title: Meta workers can opt out of being tracked at work - but only for half an hour at a time
top.summary: According to an internal memo, new controls will allow employees to pause the data collection for "up to 30 minutes at a time".
